column585:
Worst bus service ever! Avoid this company at all costs. Today is the day before Eid, and the terminal is completely deserted with almost no staff around. The scheduled departure was 7:30 AM, but it’s already 8:00 AM and the bus hasn't even arrived in the departure lane yet. Most of the staff seems to be on leave, yet they charged everyone full price. Poor families and senior citizens are forced to wait in the blistering heat because the terminal ACs aren't even working. The terminal looks so abandoned it feels like a ghost town.
And when the bus was arrived there are no staff to attend passengers and bus condition was too poor, AC is not working properly and Entertainment Tablets are not in any single seat.
Absolutely pathetic treatment of customers on a festive occasion.
